changes.comment: Upgrade the bundled compiler engine to TypeScript 6.0.x. TypeScript 6.0 changes the default `moduleResolution` for CommonJS projects from `node10` to `bundler`, which can surface new module-resolution errors when API Extractor analyzes projects that relied on the previous default; see [UPGRADING.md](https://github.com/microsoft/rushstack/blob/main/apps/api-extractor/UPGRADING.md) for migration guidance.
